zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Blakiston of Gibside於大約1516年出生在英國達勒姆可時，他的父親William Blakiston of Gibside27歲，母親Eleanor Millott21歲。他於大約1534年與Elizabeth Marley結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1575年在英國達勒姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Blakiston of Gibside于大约1516年出生在英国達勒姆可时，他的父亲William Blakiston of Gibside27岁，母亲Eleanor Millott21岁。他于大约1534年与Elizabeth Marley结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1575年在英国達勒姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blakiston
meanings: Blaec, black, isc, signifying likeness, and tun, town, meaning a blackish town

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Blakiston of Gibside was born about 1516, in Coxhoe, Durham, England, his father, William Blakiston of Gibside, was 27 and his mother, Eleanor Millott, was 21. He married Elizabeth Marley about 1534. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1575, in Durham, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Blakiston of Gibside est né environ 1516, à Coxhoe, Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Blakiston of Gibside, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Millott, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Marley environ 1534. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1575, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Blakiston of Gibside um 1516 in Coxhoe, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Blakiston of Gibside 27 und seine Mutter Eleanor Millott 21. Er hat um 1534 Elizabeth Marley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1575 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Blakiston of Gibside è nato il circa 1516 nel Coxhoe, Durham, England, il suo padre, William Blakiston of Gibside, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Millott, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Marley circa 1534. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1575, nel Durham, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Blakiston of Gibsideが約1516年にイギリスダルハムコクスhオで生まれた時，父William Blakiston of Gibsideは27歳，母Eleanor Millottは21歳であった。約1534年にElizabeth Marleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1575年にイギリスダルハムで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Blakiston of Gibside(이)가 대략 1516년 영국 뒤람 콕스호에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Blakiston of Gibside(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Millott(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 Elizabeth Marley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1575년 영국 뒤람에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Blakiston of Gibside nasceu aproximadamente 1516, em Coxhoe, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Blakiston of Gibside, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Millott, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Marley aproximadamente 1534. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1575, em Durham, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Blakiston of Gibside родился около 1516 г. в местности коксхо, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени William Blakiston of Gibside было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Millott, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Marley около 1534 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1575 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Blakiston of Gibside nació aproximadamente 1516, en Coxhoe, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, William Blakiston of Gibside, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eleanor Millott, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Marley aproximadamente 1534. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1575, en Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
